name: Supay, Duskwalker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>官</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－スーパイ
desc: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position, then you can Special Summon 1 "Supay" from your hand or Deck. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Supay, Duskwalker" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position, then you can Special Summon 1 "Supay" from your hand or Deck. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Supay, Duskwalker" once per turn.
eff: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position, then you can Special Summon 1 "Supay" from your hand or Deck. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Supay, Duskwalker" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
